headline: Hope for the Best and Plan for the Worst: The 5 Safest Dividend Aristocrats
summary: The stock market could face serious trouble in 2026 as extreme valuations collide with geopolitical tensions, AI investment skepticism, and policy headwinds. The Warren Buffett indicator has surged to about 220%, far above levels seen before past market declines, suggesting stocks may be detached from economic fundamentals, and that may be one of the major ...
